title: Changelog
text: notable changes project documented file. format based Keep Changelog, project adheres Semantic Versioning. narrative, per-feature description release, see NEWS.md. file concise, categorised trail.

title: Changelog
text: LiDAR HD MNH fetched via happign preferred CHM source (Open-Canopy ML retained fallback). E5.d phase 1. LiDAR HD MNT promoted canonical dem slot (1 m vs 25 m BD ALTI) W3 / R1 / R2 / R3 / erosion use LiDAR resolution. has_lidar_hd attribute auto-lifts NDP 1 LiDAR HD product cached. New “Hauteur LiDAR HD” badge Synthesis tab, distinct “Hauteur ML”. Reactive loaders cached CHM / MNT mod_sampling; passed create_sampling_plan() stratified GRTS kicks . forest_mask passed sampling plan (BD Forêt v2 filtered) — points stop falling water / roads. Immediate spinning-gear toast clicking Générer les placettes. Tooltip Source du CV radio clarifying picks CV value, draw method.

title: Changelog
text: Sampling-method note rewritten describe candidates regular 50 m grid, forest mask filter, GRTS → LPM2 → random selection. Map auto-zoom fixed UGF extent instead BD Forêt’s (fetched buffer). chm_phase:lidar_hd_download progress key translated. Bumped nemeton minimum >= 0.19.5.

title: Changelog
text: Duplicate PostGIS-sync toast compute completion (kept mod_home one, dropped mod_progress one). Retry button now emits immediate toast root session.

title: Changelog
text: Tooltips six sidebar inputs Export terrain sub-tab (target error, alpha risk, -sample ratio, CV position, seed, region). Custom TSP legend leaflet map (inline-SVG glyphs route, start finish). Immediate toast notification clicking Réessayer compute-error card, dispatched root session. URL BugReports fields DESCRIPTION RStudio Packages pane shows documentation icon next package.

title: Changelog
text: README counters synced real state (31 indicators, 13 expert profiles, 504 i18n keys). sampling_tt_region tooltip wording says QGIS, QField.

title: Changelog
text: Duplicate PostGIS-sync toast compute completion — removed second occurrence mod_progress; mod_home one remains.

title: Changelog
text: Export terrain — design sampling plan, render leaflet map BD Forêt v2 overlay (coloured sylvicultural context) + UGF polygons + placettes, export QField .qgz project. Import terrain — ingest GeoPackage returned QField, validate , attach aggregates project bump NDP. Sampling sizing modes Export terrain sidebar: fixed-size (legacy path) target error + CV (new). CV source can manual, derived automatically project’s cached BD Forêt v2 layer via nemeton::cv_from_bdforet(). computed sample size, Student quantile ambiguous / unmapped TFV codes displayed live. TSP route map — dashed magenta polyline connecting Base plots visit_order, inline-SVG orienteering symbols (open triangle Départ, double concentric circle Arrivée). BD Forêt v2 overlay coloured resolved forest context (futaie régulière résineuse / feuillue, futaie irrégulière, TSF, taillis simple) toggleable layer control. Field ingest module (R/mod_field_ingest.R, E5.b) — closes QField return loop: validate, aggregate, attach, persist <project>/data/field_data.gpkg, update metadata, bump NDP, reload project. Sampling export module (R/mod_sampling.R, E5.) — UI + downloadHandler producing QField-ready .qgz. Package-level help (R/nemetonshiny-package.R) ?nemetonshiny works RStudio shows documentation icon Packages pane. CITATION.cff CHANGELOG.md — release-metadata files.

title: Changelog
text: mod_sampling now uses nemeton::create_sampling_plan() (GRTS / LPM2 / random) instead plain sf::st_sample(). generation notification reports selected method. Export terrain map now draws per-UGF polygons (matching Import terrain style) instead single unioned zone; unioned zone still used internally create_sampling_plan(). Sidebar forms mod_sampling mod_field_ingest wrapped Bootstrap collapsible cards (pattern “Informations projet” accordion Selection tab). default_project_name reactive — QField project name input pre-fills sanitised current-project name, falling back id "echantillon". Renamed “Inventaire estimé ML” badge Synthesis tab “Inventaire ML”; augmented-NDP tooltips now prefix “ML = Machine Learning” discoverability. Renamed QField download button “Télécharger le projet QField (.qgz)” “Télécharger le projet QGIS”. Shortened CV-compute button label “Calculer le CV depuis BD Forêt v2” “Calculer le CV”. Bumped nemeton dependency >= 0.19.0.

title: Changelog
text: BD Forêt v2 mapping diagnostics: sizing report now lists actual ambiguous unmapped TFV codes (libellé, resolved context alternative) instead bare count. TFV column auto-detection mod_sampling widened TFV / tfv / CODE_TFV / code_tfv / essence / ESSENCE / LIB_FV / LIBELLE.

title: Changelog
text: See NEWS.md complete narrative history (0.1.0 onwards).

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: nemetonshiny est l’application Shiny/golem de la plateforme Nemeton (analyse forestière systémique, 31 indicateurs / 12 familles / radar / perspectives IA par profil). Le repo cœur métier est nemeton (paquet R séparé) ; ici n’écrit pas de logique métier, appelle les fonctions exportées de nemeton (>= 0.20.1.9004) et présente les résultats à l’utilisateur. L’extraction nemeton ↔︎ nemetonshiny eu lieu en v0.15.0 (ADR-009). Depuis, l’i18n, les profils experts, les modules Shiny, l’OAuth2, le LLM et les services applicatifs (cadastre, communes, projet, monitoring, sampling, export) vivent ici.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Toutes les clés techniques suivent cette norme : snake_case français sans accent : famille_biodiversite, monitoring_ingest_starting, health_validation_status Translittération : é→e, è→e, ê→e, à→, ô→o, î→, ù→u, ç→c Codes courts en majuscules : B, C, W, , F, L, T, R, S, P, E, N, B1, C2 Maximum 30 caractères par clé i18n Pas d’abréviation sauf codes établis Le code legacy en anglais (mod_home, service_compute, mod_family) reste tel quel — ne renomme pas ce qui fonctionne. Les clés i18n nouvelles doivent suivre la convention.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Règle de dépendance : les flèches vont toujours vers nemeton. nemetonshiny importe nemeton (120+ fonctions exportées, commit 720a433) ; jamais l’inverse.
code: nemeton                → Cœur métier : indicateurs, familles, NDP, normalisation, FORDEAD, monitoring DB. nemetonshiny (ce repo) → Application Shiny/golem : UI, modules, i18n, profils experts, LLM, OAuth2. tree_sat_nemeton       → Classification d'essences par Sentinel-1/2 (NDP 0). maestro_nemeton        → Classification d'essences par MAESTRO ViT (ortho+MNT, NDP 1+). opencanopynemeton      → Canopy Height Models (CHM) consommés par nemeton (spec 005). platform_nemeton       → Documentation plateforme, ADR, glossaire.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Détails et formules : voir nemeton/CLAUDE.md. Côté app, les noms de famille / indicateurs sont lus depuis nemeton::INDICATOR_FAMILIES — ne pas dupliquer la liste.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Le NDP mesure la qualité des données d’entrée, pas le nombre de familles calculées (les 12 sont toujours calculées). Niveaux 0..4, pondération Fibonacci, confiance φ. Implémentation dans nemeton/R/ndp.R. Les widgets HTML (ndp_badge(), ndp_progress_bar()) ont été déplacés dans ce repo (commit 64ba7b1 côté nemeton) et vivent dans R/ndp.R. L’app actuelle est en NDP 0 (sources publiques uniquement). Le score global affiché par mod_synthesis provient de nemeton::compute_general_index() — pas d’un mean() local.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Les profils sont des fichiers YAML bilingues FR/EN dans inst/experts/*.yml. Chacun définit un acteur de la filière forêt-bois et son focus (familles prioritaires, ton, objectifs). Le module R/llm_prompts.R les charge et construit les prompts envoyés au LLM (Mistral / Anthropic / OpenAI via ellmer). Le profil generalist.yml est le fallback générique. Le YAML _example.yml.template documente le format pour ajouter un nouveau profil.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Inventaire (contexte_inventaire) — collecte/validation données terrain et satellite (mod_home, mod_search, mod_field_ingest) Analyse systémique (contexte_analyse) — calcul des 31 indicateurs via nemeton, agrégation 12 familles, radar, Fibonacci (mod_synthesis, mod_family, service_compute) Cartographie (contexte_cartographie) — Leaflet, parcelles, UGF, LiDAR, satellite (mod_map, mod_ug) Santé (contexte_sante) — surveillance rapide (NDVI/NBR rolling-window) + diagnostic FORDEAD (CRSWIR + harmonique via reticulate), R5, workflow QGIS/QField de validation. Voir spec 008 et ADR-013. (mod_monitoring, service_monitoring, service_monitoring_db) Aide à la décision (contexte_aide_decision) — perspectives IA, profils experts (R/llm_prompts.R, inst/experts/) Utilisateurs (contexte_utilisateurs) — auth, profils, droits, partage (mod_auth via shinyOAuth) Interopérabilité (contexte_interoperabilite) — export IFN, GroundForest, QField/QGIS, OGC (service_export, mod_sampling)

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Les ADR vivent dans platform_nemeton/docs/. Rappel des décisions structurantes pour l’app :

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: nemetonshiny n’pas son propre PLAN.md : la séquence des épaississements (E1, E2, …) est partagée avec nemeton dans nemeton/PLAN.md à la racine du repo voisin. Cette source unique de vérité indique pour chaque épaississement quel package porte la livraison (cœur ou app). À chaque release nemetonshiny, met à jour ce PLAN.md commun (cocher la case + ajouter une entrée datée au journal) — cf. Consignes de release, étape 8.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: L’i18n vit ici depuis v0.15.0. Tout texte affiché passe par i18n ; jamais de littéral français/anglais dans un module. Source unique : liste TRANSLATIONS dans R/utils_i18n.R (~360 clés, FR/EN). Une helper export_translations_json() permet un export JSON ponctuel pour les traducteurs. API : i18n <- get_i18n(lang) puis i18n$t("clé"). i18n$language retourne "fr" ou "en". Encodage : caractères accentués obligatoirement en \uXXXX (ex. synchronisé, Répertoire). Cohérence avec le repo, et évite les surprises Windows / locale. Prompts LLM : bilingues, dans inst/experts/*.yml (sections prompt_fr et prompt_en). Extension européenne : DE, ES, prévus ultérieurement. Le format list(fr=..., en=...) se généralise sans modification structurelle (list(fr=..., en=..., de=..., ...)). L’implémentation est maison (pas shiny.i18n) : refresh automatique sans rebuild, support dynamique du switch langue.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: mod_auth.R consomme shinyOAuth (Suggests). Provider attendu : Keycloak (ADR-005), avec fédération AgentConnect côté ProConnect en France et eIDAS Europe. keycloak/ à la racine du repo contient le compose dev local et les realms. Mode anonyme : la session démarre en profil_citoyen jusqu’à login.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: R/llm_prompts.R charge les YAML inst/experts/*.yml et construit les prompts par profil sélectionné. Backend via ellmer — supporte Mistral (souverain FR, ADR-004), Anthropic (Claude), OpenAI. L’API key se lit dans une variable d’environnement (MISTRAL_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY) — jamais en dur, jamais commitée.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: R >= 4.1.0 golem pour la structuration Shiny bslib (Bootstrap 5) pour le layout, bsicons pour les icônes leaflet + leaflet.extras + maptiles pour la cartographie plotly pour le radar et les séries temporelles ; fmsb était utilisé avant la promotion de plotly en Imports (v0.21.0) sf, terra, lwgeom pour le spatial promises + future + later pour l’asynchrone (shiny::ExtendedTask, future_promise) ellmer pour l’intégration LLM multi-provider shinyOAuth pour l’authentification (Suggests, ADR-005) DT pour les tables, htmltools + htmlwidgets pour les tags HTML custom DBI + RPostgres pour PostgreSQL/PostGIS (Suggests) arrow + geoarrow pour Parquet/GeoArrow (Suggests) i18n maison dans R/utils_i18n.R testthat edition 3 (+ shinytest2 prévu pour les tests E2E) cicerone pour les tours guidés (Suggests) quarto pour les exports rapport (Suggests) Remotes: pobsteta/nemeton dans DESCRIPTION — installation locale en dev via pak::local_install("/home/pascal/dev/nemeton") ou pkgload::load_all("/home/pascal/dev/nemeton").

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
code: # Lancer l'application en dev Rscript -e 'pkgload::load_all("."); nemetonshiny::run_app()'  # Lancer tous les tests Rscript -e 'devtools::test()'  # Lancer un test spécifique Rscript -e 'pkgload::load_all("."); testthat::test_file("tests/testthat/test-mod_monitoring.R")'  # Régénérer la documentation roxygen Rscript -e 'devtools::document()'  # Vérifier le package Rscript -e 'devtools::check()'  # Couverture de code Rscript -e 'cat(covr::percent_coverage(covr::package_coverage(quiet=TRUE)))'  # Exporter les traductions JSON pour les traducteurs Rscript -e 'pkgload::load_all("."); cat(nemetonshiny:::export_translations_json())'

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Pattern golem : un module = mod_xxx_ui(id) + mod_xxx_server(id, app_state, ...). app_state est un reactiveValues partagé (current_project, project_id, project_status, current_user, …). Les modules n’appellent jamais directement une fonction métier de calcul d’indicateur — ils passent par R/service_*.R. Pas de observe() orphelin : utiliser observeEvent() ou bindEvent() pour scoper le déclenchement. Sortir l’i18n du module sous forme de reactive (i18n_r()) si la langue peut changer pendant la session.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Logique applicative non-Shiny : appel des fonctions nemeton::*, accès DB, IO disque, cache. Une fonction = une responsabilité ; testable hors session Shiny. R/service_compute.R : ExtendedTask + future_promise pour les calculs longs (calcul indicateurs, ingestion, export). R/service_monitoring.R / service_monitoring_db.R : adaptateurs pour le contexte santé (E6). R/service_db.R : connexion PostGIS, résolution NEMETON_DB_URL > POSTGRESQL_ADDON_* > NEMETON_DB_HOST/....

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Documentation roxygen en anglais (cohérence avec nemeton). Commentaires inline en français OK. Nouveaux helpers : préfixés . si privés au fichier (.resolve_db_config, .coerce_ndp_level).

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Aucun littéral français/anglais dans une UI. Toujours i18n$t("clé"). Une nouvelle clé i18n = une entrée dans TRANSLATIONS (R/utils_i18n.R), dans la section thématique appropriée (Project, Monitoring, Sampling, …). Encodage \uXXXX pour les caractères accentués. Si un texte combine i18n + variables, utiliser sprintf(i18n$t("foo_with_count"), n) avec %d / %s dans la traduction.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Framework : testthat edition 3. Nommage : tests/testthat/test-{module|service}.R. testServer() pour les modules Shiny (contribue à covr). shinytest2::AppDriver pour les tests E2E (ne contribue pas à covr) — .exit(app$stop()) obligatoire. Pour mocker une fonction métier : testthat::local_mocked_bindings(nemeton_fonction = stub, .package = "nemeton"). Variables DB de test : NEMETON_DB_URL_TEST (gitignore via .Renviron).

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: withr::with_envvar(c(...)) pour neutraliser les vars d’env DB / OAuth dans les tests. withr::with_tempdir() pour les fichiers temporaires (sauvegardes projet, exports). Fixtures projet : tests/testthat/fixtures/.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
code: R/app_ui.R                    → UI principale (navbarPage, onglets) R/app_server.R                → Server principal, app_state global R/run_app.R                   → Point d'entrée golem R/app_config.R                → Options app (project_dir, theme, ...)  R/mod_home.R                  → Sélection commune/cadastre, carte, chargement projet R/mod_search.R                → Recherche commune (BAN) R/mod_map.R                   → Carte Leaflet partagée R/mod_project.R               → Métadonnées projet (nom, owner, profil groupes, dossier) R/mod_ug.R                    → Unités de Gestion Forestière (UGF) R/mod_synthesis.R             → Score global, radar, perspective IA R/mod_family.R                → Vue détaillée par famille R/mod_sampling.R              → Plan d'échantillonnage terrain (GRTS, TSP, QGIS export) R/mod_field_ingest.R          → Ingestion GPKG terrain (E5.b) + validation sanitaire (E6.c.5) R/mod_monitoring.R            → Suivi sanitaire — surveillance rapide + diagnostic FORDEAD (E6) R/mod_progress.R              → Toasts/notifications de progression unifiées R/mod_auth.R                  → OAuth2/OIDC via shinyOAuth (E4)  R/service_cadastre.R          → API cadastre IGN R/service_communes.R          → BAN, INSEE, départements R/service_project.R           → CRUD projet (disque + DB), métadonnées R/service_compute.R           → Calcul async des 31 indicateurs (ExtendedTask) R/service_db.R                → Connexion PostGIS (résolution env vars) R/service_export.R            → Export Quarto, PDF, IFN, GroundForest R/service_monitoring.R        → ExtendedTask pour ingest Sentinel-2 + run FORDEAD R/service_monitoring_db.R     → Adapter env→URL pour nemeton::db_connect (TimescaleDB)  R/llm_prompts.R               → Profils experts → prompts LLM (ellmer) R/utils_i18n.R                → TRANSLATIONS FR/EN (~360 clés) R/utils_theme.R               → Thème bslib, palettes R/ndp.R                       → Widgets NDP (badge, progress bar) R/config_groupes.R            → Profils groupes UGF (ONF/CRPF/OFB/Generic) R/domain_ug.R                 → Helpers domaine UGF R/migrate.R                   → Migrations métadonnées projet entre versions R/zzz.R                       → .onLoad / .onAttach  inst/app/                     → Assets statiques (www/css/js/img) inst/config/                  → Fichiers de config (golem) inst/experts/                 → 13 profils experts YAML + template + generalist inst/extdata/                 → Données embarquées (référentiels, schémas) inst/quarto/                  → Templates Quarto pour exports rapport inst/sql/                     → Migrations PostGIS (schema, indexes)  keycloak/                     → Compose dev + realms pour auth locale .Renviron                     → Vars locales (NEMETON_DB_URL, OAuth secrets) — gitignore

what: Consignes de release pour ce projet
title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: À chaque push qui modifie le code fonctionnel (hors doc pure, hors CI), Claude doit : Déterminer le type de changement selon Conventional Commits (feat: / fix: / BREAKING CHANGE:) → bump semver correspondant (minor / patch / major). Mettre à jour le numéro de version dans : DESCRIPTION (champ Version) [projet R] NEWS.md (ajouter une entrée datée) CITATION.cff si présent Créer un tag git annoté : git tag -vX.Y.Z -m “Release X.Y.Z” Pousser le tag : git push origin vX.Y.Z Créer la release GitHub via gh : gh release create vX.Y.Z –generate-notes Vérifier que les badges du README pointent vers la bonne version et la dernière release (badges shields.io, R-CMD-check, codecov…). Si le CHANGELOG.md existe, ajouter la section [X.Y.Z] - YYYY-MM-DD avec les catégories Added / Changed / Fixed / Removed. Mettre à jour le PLAN.md du repo nemeton (source unique de vérité partagée) : cocher la case du sous-chantier livré, ajouter une entrée datée au journal qui indique explicitement le commit nemetonshiny@SHA et le cycle dev. Ne jamais clore un chantier dans PLAN.md sans qu’une release correspondante ait été poussée.

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Le repo suit un cycle dev X.Y.Z.9000+ qui s’accumule entre les releases stables. Chaque commit fonctionnel pousse le quatrième segment (.9001, .9002, …) sans tag ; quand un chantier est complet (épaississement clos, hardening fini, etc.), bumpe en vX.Y.Z stable et crée le tag + release GitHub. Le PLAN.md indique pour chaque entrée le cycle dev concerné (ex. 0.21.0.9000 → 0.21.0.9001).

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: La version dans DESCRIPTION, le tag git et la release GitHub doivent être strictement identiques. Ne jamais pousser un tag sans avoir d’abord mis à jour DESCRIPTION et NEWS.md. Vérifier que la page de documentation (pkgdown) est aussi à jour de la version et de ses tags. Toujours demander confirmation avant un bump majeur. Quand un changement implique aussi nemeton, faire les deux releases dans l’ordre cœur → app (l’app dépend du cœur, jamais l’inverse).

title: CLAUDE.md — Nemetonshiny Development Reference
text: Aucune logique métier dans nemetonshiny (indicateurs, familles, NDP). Tout passe par nemeton. Aucune logique métier dans R/mod_*.R non plus — les modules consomment R/service_*.R. i18n obligatoire : i18n$t("clé") partout, jamais de littéral. Encodage \uXXXX pour les caractères accentués dans les sources R (utils_i18n.R notamment). Chaque nouvelle fonction exportée un test dans tests/testthat/. Les rasters et le LiDAR ne sont JAMAIS stockés en DB (ADR-002) — seulement les agrégats. Pas de dépendance inverse : nemeton n’importe JAMAIS nemetonshiny. Pas de secret en dur : OAuth, API LLM, DB → variables d’environnement (.Renviron gitignore). Pas de print() / cat() / message() en code de prod : passer par cli::cli_* ou shiny::showNotification selon contexte. Quand je travaille sur une tâche longue, maintenir le PLAN.md du repo nemeton à jour à chaque étape terminée (chantier en cours + journal).

what: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: Application Shiny/golem pour la plateforme d’analyse systemique forestiere Nemeton. nemetonshiny fournit l’interface utilisateur interactive. La logique metier (indicateurs, calculs, referentiels) est portee par le package nemeton (>= 0.19.5).

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: Carte interactive – selection de parcelles cadastrales via Leaflet et l’API cadastre IGN Gestion de projets – creation, sauvegarde et restauration de diagnostics forestiers 31 indicateurs Nemeton – calcul automatique sur les parcelles selectionnees 12 familles d’indicateurs – visualisation radar, scores et detail par famille Synthese LLM – analyse contextuelle par 13 profils d’experts (ellmer / Mistral) Export PDF & GeoPackage – rapports Quarto et donnees geospatiales Internationalisation – francais et anglais (504 cles de traduction) Accessibilite – conformite WCAG 2.1 AA

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: R >= 4.1.0 nemeton >= 0.19.5 (package core) Librairies systeme : GDAL, GEOS, PROJ, libudunits2

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: shiny, bslib, leaflet, sf, terra, DT, promises, ellmer, httr2, yaml, jsonlite. Voir le fichier DESCRIPTION pour la liste complete.

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
code: # Installer le package core nemeton remotes::install_github("pobsteta/nemeton")  # Installer nemetonshiny remotes::install_github("pobsteta/nemetonshiny")

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: Options disponibles :

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: Le docker-compose.yml demarre : - Keycloak (port 8080) – authentification OAuth2/OIDC - nemetonshiny (port 3838) – application Shiny Variables d’environnement configurables dans docker-compose.yml : - NEMETON_LANG – langue (defaut : fr) - NEMETON_PAYS – pays (defaut : FR) - MISTRAL_API_KEY – cle API Mistral pour la synthese LLM

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: Le projet suit l’architecture golem :
code: R/   app_ui.R / app_server.R   -- UI et serveur principaux   mod_*.R                    -- modules Shiny (auth, home, map, project,                                 family, synthesis, search, progress)   service_*.R                -- services (cadastre, communes, compute,                                 db, export, project)   llm_prompts.R              -- gestion des prompts LLM   utils_i18n.R               -- internationalisation   utils_theme.R              -- theme et styles  inst/   experts/                   -- 16 profils d'experts LLM (YAML)   quarto/                    -- template de rapport PDF   sql/                       -- schema et migrations

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: 20 fichiers de tests couvrant l’ensemble des modules et services.

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: EUPL v1.2 Les donnees sont soumises des conditions specifiques decrites dans LICENSE-DATA.md.

title: nemetonApp Configuration — app_config
text: Configuration constants settings nemetonApp Shiny application.

title: Management Group Profiles Configuration — config_groupes
text: Loads exposes configurable profiles used classify UGF (Unités de Gestion Forestière). profile selected project determines:   - dropdown label (e.g. "Groupe d'aménagement" ONF,     "Groupe de gestion" CRPF, "Zone" OFB/ENS)   - list allowed codes + human-readable labels   - color palette used map   - codes considered "hors production" (excluded     production-oriented indicators) Profiles defined `inst/config/groupes_amenagement.yaml` can overridden user-level file `~/.local/share/nemeton/groupes_amenagement.yaml` (via `nemeton.groupes_config` option).

title: Initialize database schema — db_init_schema
text: Creates nemeton schema, tables, indexes exist. Reads inst/sql/schema.sql.

title: Initialize database schema — db_init_schema
text: con DBI connection object. NULL, creates new connection.

title: Initialize database schema — db_init_schema
text: Logical. TRUE successful.

what: Sync local project to database — db_sync_project
title: Sync local project to database — db_sync_project
text: Uploads local project (parquet files) PostGIS database.

title: Sync local project to database — db_sync_project
Sync local project to database — db_sync_project
text: project_id Character. Local project ID. con DBI connection. NULL, creates new one.

title: Sync local project to database — db_sync_project
text: Logical. TRUE successful.

what: Domain Layer: Unités de Gestion (UG) — domain_ug
title: Domain Layer: Unités de Gestion (UG) — domain_ug
text: Pure domain logic Management Units (UG). Contains constructors, commands, queries, invariant validation. Shiny dependency. Domain concepts: - Parcelle cadastrale: immutable cadastral polygon - Tenement: smallest geometric subdivision (whole parcel fragment) - UG: grouping 1+ tenements = operational forestry unit - Groupe d'aménagement: functional classification UGs command returns new projet (functional immutability). 5 invariants enforced every command.

what: Download functions for external data sources — download_functions
title: Download functions for external data sources — download_functions
text: Functions download raster vector data various French geographic data providers (IGN, INPN, Copernicus).

what: Generate PDF report (main entry point) — generate_report_pdf
title: Generate PDF report (main entry point) — generate_report_pdf
text: Generates PDF report, using Quarto available falling back simple PDF generation.

title: Generate PDF report (main entry point) — generate_report_pdf
code: generate_report_pdf(   project,   family_scores,   output_file,   language = "fr",   synthesis_comments = NULL,   family_comments = NULL,   cover_image = NULL,   use_quarto = TRUE )

title: Generate PDF report (main entry point) — generate_report_pdf
text: project List. Project object. family_scores sf. Family scores. output_file Character. Path output PDF. language Character. Language code. synthesis_comments Character. Optional synthesis comments (supports markdown). family_comments Named list. Optional comments per family (keyed family code, supports markdown). cover_image Character. Optional path cover image first page. use_quarto Logical. Whether try Quarto first. Default TRUE.

title: Generate PDF report (main entry point) — generate_report_pdf
text: Character. Path generated PDF.

title: LLM Prompts — llm_prompts
text: System user prompts LLM-based analysis nemeton.

what: Project Migration: v1 to v2 (UG support) — migrate
title: Project Migration: v1 to v2 (UG support) — migrate
text: Migrates projects schema v1 (parcel-) v2 (UG support). Creates default tenements UGs 1 parcel = 1 tenement = 1 UG. Migration transparent: existing indicator values preserved exactly. UG layer additive — sits top unchanged parcel data.

title: Authentication Module using shinyOAuth — mod_auth
text: OAuth2/OIDC authentication module nemetonApp. Supports Keycloak, Google, GitHub, Microsoft, OIDC provider. Authentication optional: OAuth credentials configured, app runs without authentication (mode anonyme).

what: Field Ingest Module for nemetonApp — mod_field_ingest
title: Field Ingest Module for nemetonApp — mod_field_ingest
text: QField return path (E5.b). Takes GeoPackage produced QField field session, validates placette / arbre schemas, aggregates per-plot dendrometric metrics attaches project's forest units. Persisting field data bumps NDP level (0 -> 2 placettes , 0 -> 3 trees captured sufficient density) via nemeton::detect_ndp(). MVP persists validated field data new NDP level project, rerun compute_all_indicators. user triggers recompute Home tab afterwards; indicators consume field aggregates (P1, P2, B2, C1, R2) pick project layers.

title: Home Module for nemetonApp — mod_home
text: Main home/selection page module integrates: - Recent projects list - Commune search - Map parcel selection - Project creation form

title: Map Module for nemetonApp — mod_map
text: Shiny module displaying interactive Leaflet map cadastral parcels. Supports parcel selection/deselection click, basemap switching, enforces maximum selection limit.

title: Progress Module for nemetonApp — mod_progress
text: Shiny module displaying computation progress. Shows download computation status detailed progress.

title: Project Module for nemetonApp — mod_project
text: Shiny module project metadata form. Handles project name, description, owner, creation date.

title: Sampling Module for nemetonApp — mod_sampling
text: Field sampling plan module. Lets user generate sampling plots current project's study area download QField project (.qgz) -field data capture. .qgz produced nemeton::create_qfield_project() bundles placettes + empty arbres layers pre-configured forms. First iteration uses spatial random draw (sf::st_sample). full stratified GRTS pipeline lives 09-sampling tutorial lifted nemeton create_sampling_plan() follow-iteration.

title: Search Module for nemetonApp — mod_search
text: Shiny module searching selecting French communes. Provides department filtering commune selection.

title: UG (Management Units) Module — mod_ug
text: Shiny module managing Unites de Gestion (UG). Boucle 1: table + leaflet map tenement selection, merge/split/rename, groupe d'amenagement assignment, color-coded map display.

title: NDP Shiny Widgets — ndp_widgets
text: Shiny-specific NDP widgets (badge, progress bar). UI components belong nemetonshiny, nemeton core package. NDP functions (NDP_LEVELS, detect_ndp, compute_general_index, get_ndp_level, set/restore_ndp_attributes, etc.) live nemeton core package. Exported ones called via nemeton::, internal helpers imported R/imports.R via utils::getFromNamespace().

what: nemetonshiny: Shiny front-end for the Nemeton systemic forest analysis platform — nemetonshiny-package
title: nemetonshiny: Shiny front-end for the Nemeton systemic forest analysis platform — nemetonshiny-package
text: nemetonshiny package provides golem-based Shiny application consumes business logic nemeton core package. covers project management, indicator radar visualisation, per-family dashboards, QField field workflow (export + ingest), OAuth2 authentication LLM-powered expert profiles. package contains business logic: every indicator calculation, every NDP / CV / sample-size helper lives nemeton. Dependency direction strict: nemetonshiny imports nemeton, never way around (ADR-009).

title: nemetonshiny: Shiny front-end for the Nemeton systemic forest analysis platform — nemetonshiny-package
nemetonshiny: Shiny front-end for the Nemeton systemic forest analysis platform — nemetonshiny-package
text: Selection - cadastral search, parcel picking,     project creation compute trigger. Synthesis - global score, radar, augmented NDP     badges, AI-driven perspectives per actor profile. Terrain - two sub-tabs: Export terrain: design sampling plan         target error + CV (derived BD Forêt v2 manual)         export QField .qgz project. Import terrain: ingest GeoPackage returned         QField, validate , attach aggregates project         bump NDP. Indicator families - one panel per family     table, map expert commentary.

title: nemetonshiny: Shiny front-end for the Nemeton systemic forest analysis platform — nemetonshiny-package
text: Language handled via -house translator utils_i18n. Currently 358+ FR / EN keys.

title: nemetonshiny: Shiny front-end for the Nemeton systemic forest analysis platform — nemetonshiny-package

title: nemetonshiny: Shiny front-end for the Nemeton systemic forest analysis platform — nemetonshiny-package
text: Pascal Obstétar (pascal.obstetar@gmail.com)

what: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
text: Launches interactive nemetonApp parcel selection forest indicator analysis. application allows users : Search select cadastral parcels interactive map Create projects metadata Calculate 29 nemeton indicators automatically Analyze results indicator family (12 tabs) Export PDF reports GeoPackage data

title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
text: language Character. Interface language: "fr" (French, default) "en" (English). NULL, system language auto-detected. project_dir Character. Directory storing projects. Default: ~/.nemeton/projects max_parcels Integer. Maximum number parcels can selected simultaneously map. Default: 30. Must positive integer. ... Additional arguments passed shinyApp.

title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
text: Shiny application object (invisibly).

title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
text: application requires internet connection : Cadastral parcel data (API Cadastre / happign fallback External data layers (INPN, IGN BD Forêt, Corine Land Cover) Projects saved locally GeoParquet format efficient caching.

title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
text: application follows WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines: Color contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 Keyboard navigation support Colorblind-friendly viridis palettes Touch targets >= 44px

title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
code: if (interactive()) {   # Launch with default settings (French)   run_app()    # Launch in English   run_app(language = "en")    # Custom project directory   run_app(project_dir = "~/my_nemeton_projects")    # Raise the selectable parcels limit to 50   run_app(max_parcels = 50) }

title: Cadastre Service for nemetonApp — service_cadastre
text: Service retrieving cadastral parcel data French cadastre. Uses API Cadastre (data.gouv.fr) primary source happign fallback.

title: Communes Service for nemetonApp — service_communes
text: Service searching retrieving French commune (municipality) data. Provides autocomplete functionality geometry retrieval.

title: Compute Service for nemetonApp — service_compute
text: Service managing asynchronous indicator calculations. Handles data downloading, caching, computation orchestration.

title: Database Service for PostgreSQL/PostGIS — service_db
text: Connection operations PostgreSQL/PostGIS database (ADR-002). database stores projects, parcels, indicators, users multi-user access spatial queries. Connection optional: database credentials configured, app falls back local parquet storage.

title: Export Services — service_export
text: Functions exporting nemeton project data generating reports.

title: Project Service for nemetonApp — service_project
text: Service managing nemeton projects - creation, saving, loading. Projects stored GeoParquet format efficient spatial data handling.

title: Tenement Splitting Functions — tenement_split
text: Functions splitting cadastral parcels sub-tenements via imported geometries (GeoJSON/Shapefile). Maintains cadastral tiling invariant. Boucle 2: Import-based splitting . Interactive splitting (leaflet draw) planned boucle 3.

title: Internationalization (i18n) for nemetonApp — utils_i18n
text: Translation system nemetonApp Shiny application. Supports French (fr) English (en).

title: nemetonApp Theme Configuration — utils_theme
text: Theme accessibility configuration nemetonApp Shiny application. Implements WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility guidelines.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.3 (2026-05-09)
text: feat(action_plan) — global DT search box now uses regex semantics (#35). Typing eclaircie|plantation search box returns rows matching either term. Search case-insensitive (caseInsensitive = TRUE) accent-less typing keeps working. feat(action_plan) — new Surface totale badge totals strip action table (#36, plus reorder release). Sums surface_ha rows currently visible DT, formatted two decimals + ha, rendered text-primary. badge sits Bilan monetary totals (Coût / Revenu / Bilan) read first surface tally trailing metric. pill() helper now accepts optional unit digits arguments (defaulting "EUR" / 0) backward-compat three monetary pills. refactor(action_plan) — DT table paginated 5 rows per page (50 60 vh internal scroll). New lengthMenu lets users expand 10 / 25 / 50 / demand; dom switched "frtip" "lfrtip" length selector sits left global search. Removed scrollY + scrollCollapse table card now contracts around visible rows instead padding 60 vh. scrollX = TRUE two pinned columns (UGF + Année) unchanged. ui(action_plan) — sidebar title now carries icon reads “Tableau des actions” (#37) tighter visual link table card controls. ui(action_plan) — bulk-status block (Statut Kanban section duplicated per-card Kanban moves) dropped favour collapsible action card (#38) sidebar stays scannable. ui(action_plan) — right action panel resized 350 px dual collapse behavior (#39): bslib sidebar can collapse, action card inside collapse toggle.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.3 (2026-05-09)
text: feat(action_plan) — role-based write permissions (#40). New helper can_edit_action_plan(auth_state) centralises role convention used across tab: roles proprietaire, editeur, admin, manager, owner, editor allowed mutate plan; anonymous sessions default editor preserve current dev experience; lecteur role (unrecognised role) read-. app_state$auth now exposes auth reactive action plan module can subscribe . Read-sessions see banner action table 8 server-side mutation observers (add / edit / delete / bulk status / IA generation / Kanban drop / GeoPackage write / PDF write) bounce back toast. Kanban drop handler also rolls back optimistic UI move user lacks edit rights. 5 unit tests can_edit_action_plan(). Closes #22, refs #7.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.3 (2026-05-09)
text: feat(auth) — NEMETON_AUTH_DEV_ROLES env override (#41). anonymous mode (OAuth client configured), auth_state$user_roles now seeded comma-separated env var NEMETON_AUTH_DEV_ROLES (e.g. NEMETON_AUTH_DEV_ROLES=lecteur test read-banner). Lets developers exercise role-based mutation guards landed PR #40 without standing Keycloak realm. Refs #7.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.3 (2026-05-09)
text: New key action_plan_total_surface (FR: Surface totale / EN: Total area). New keys Lot 6 read-banner + permission-denied toast (FR/EN), bundled PR #40.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.2 (2026-05-06)
text: refactor(action_plan) — DT table trimmed stabilised. Removed columns Type libre, Objectifs, RDI, Source — rarely used, made horizontal scroll worse, underlying fields still editable row-level form. Per-column filter row dropped (filter = "top" → filter = "none"); global search box single filter exposed. Rows now uniform height: datatable carries class = "compact stripe hover nowrap" scoped .dt-truncate rule (max-width: 220px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis) keeps long commentaire / labels single line. two pinned left columns (UGF + Année) unchanged. feat(action_plan) — Kanban board layout reorganised. four active workflow stages (Proposée, Validée, Planifiée, Réalisée) sit side side 4-column grid; Abandonnée rendered full-width separate, less prominent archive lane. Empty columns now reserve 60 px drop zone cards can dragged . Allowed transition → update_action_in_plan() + save_action_plan(), plan_rv() bumped, triggers renderUI re-run confirms move. Refused transition (e.g. trying drag Réalisée card back Proposée) → warning toast surfaces offending pair, kanban_render_token bumped re-render board, puts card back data says belongs. previous per-card Déplacer dropdown preserved — paths share validator + persistence code.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.2 (2026-05-06)
text: New key action_plan_kanban_drop_invalid_fmt (FR/EN) refused-transition toast.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.2 (2026-05-06)
text: tests/testthat/test-mod_action_plan.R — three new test_thats: vendored asset existence (Sortable-1.15.6.min.js + action_plan_kanban.js), validator coverage legal vs refused drag-drop transitions, presence new i18n key locales.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.1 (2026-05-06)
text: fix(action_plan) — empty action plans longer crash reactive chain. actions_df_all() assigning length-1 NA_character_ df$ug_label 0-row data.frame, R rejects “replacement 1 row, data 0”. 0-row branch now returns early explicit empty columns. Surfaced fresh project actions yet (regression introduced v0.22.0 new Plan d’actions tab).

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.1 (2026-05-06)
text: feat(db) — app schema (nemeton.projects friends) now initialized automatically first connection get_db_connection(). existing idempotent db_init_schema() used exported never invoked, freshly provisioned database surfaced “relation "nemeton.projects" exist” first project save. Memoized per R session via .nemeton_env. feat(monitoring) — monitoring-DB migrations (monitoring_zone, alert, obs_pixel, …) now applied automatically first connection get_monitoring_db_connection() calling nemeton::db_migrate(). Monitoring tab longer warns “relation "monitoring_zone" exist” fresh TimescaleDB. Memoized per R session via .nemeton_env.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.0 (2026-05-06)
text: full new tab dedicated building, visualising exporting multi-year forest action plans, delivered across PRs #23..#34. Lot 1+2 (S1..S6, #23) — scaffold tab, interactive Leaflet map + DT table two-way sync, per-UGF action rows. Lot 3 (S7+S8, #25) — LLM-powered plan generation new planificateur expert profile, Kanban board view, audit modal exposing prompt, model, latency token counts generation. Lot 4 (S9..S11, #30) — cumulative balance sparkline per UGF, Gantt timeline scheduled actions, bridges row Terrain tab (jump matching plot). Lot 5 (S12+S13, #32) — GeoPackage export full plan per-UGF PDF export new Quarto template inst/quarto/action_plan_template.qmd. Bilan column + steered LLM (#29) — derive per-UGF balance column (revenu_eur - cout_eur, cumulative) steer LLM prompt toward solutions keep cumulative balance positive planning horizon. revenu_eur field (#28) — new revenue column alongside cout_eur, propagated views, exports prompts. UI polish — 50/50 layout native DT filters frozen UGF label column (#26), map auto-refit bbox change calendar year display (#27), categorical year legend UGF label popup (#31), Kanban board sticky DT header (#33), right-hand bslib action sidebar grouping toolbar buttons intent (#34, refs #7). Robustness (#24) — guard map color palettes plan empty tab never crashes project actions.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.0 (2026-05-06)
text: feat(project) — Informations projet card now shows storage directory loaded project, users can locate GeoPackage metadata files without leaving app. feat(home) — PostGIS sync toast now reports actual target dbname@host:port, users immediately know database commune cache going . feat(home) — load active project Monitoring zone picker users redraw AOI switching tabs. feat(monitoring) — “Enregistrer comme zone” button now exposes tooltip explaining disabled (AOI drawn, project loaded, etc.). i18n(monitoring) — clarify FAST naming quick-mode labels. refactor(monitoring) — rename health-export “QField” labels “QGIS” UI match actually produced (.qgz project file). fix(db) — service_db.R now honors NEMETON_DB_URL priority legacy POSTGRESQL_ADDON_* Clever Cloud variables, local overrides respected. fix(sampling) — surface silent save_samples() failures user-visible toast instead swallowing error.

title: nemetonshiny 0.22.0 (2026-05-06)
text: New module R/mod_action_plan.R (~1816 LOC) service layer R/service_action_plan.R (~686 LOC). New expert profile inst/experts/planificateur.yml. New Quarto template inst/quarto/action_plan_template.qmd. New tests test-action_plan_prompts.R, test-mod_action_plan.R, test-service_action_plan.R (~500 LOC testthat). R/utils_i18n.R — +263 LOC new keys (NMT convention) Plan d’actions tab FR/EN.

what: New feature — Forest health monitoring (E6.c.5, spec 008)
title: nemetonshiny 0.21.0 (2026-04-30)
text: Monitoring tab now two-mode forest health workstation. Mode 1 — Surveillance rapide (existing E6.b NDVI/NBR rolling window, kept -) detects recent shocks (cuts, windthrows, fires) seconds. Mode 2 — Diagnostic sanitaire (FORDEAD) wraps nemeton::run_fordead_dieback() (CRSWIR + harmonic model via reticulate, GPL-3 isolated Python frontier) shiny::ExtendedTask. Detects progressive dieback (bark beetle, drought) conifers minutes--hours. pipelines write alert table. G1 — class filter. default leaflet shows confidence_class 3-forte 4-sol-nu (>70% true positives per ONF/DSF 2024). “Inclure faible/moyenne” toggle adds 1-2 classes surfaces border-warning banner citing --50% false-positive rate. G2 — disturbance classification. Alerts go nemeton::classify_disturbance() server-side, popup carries disturbance_type separate progressive dieback mechanical intervention. G3 — validity banners + confirmation modal. nemeton::check_fordead_validity() called current zone whenever user enters health mode. Two border-warning banners fire AOI overlaps 5 validated departments (88, 39, 01, 73, 74) 50%, épicéa + sapin pectiné drops 70%. Launching FORDEAD --domain area pops modal citing ONF/DSF caveat; “Run anyway” forwards task. G4 — QField field-validation workflow. new card health mode lets user pick n plots (default 30) sampling method (GRTS / random) download .qgz. Re-uploading filled GPKG via new “Validation sanitaire” sub-tab Données terrain runs nemeton::ingest_health_validation(), reports counts (confirmed / false-positive / unmatched), updates validation_status + validation_cause per alert. G5 — R5 dieback indicator. radar’s R-family picks R5 automatically nemeton::INDICATOR_FAMILIES$R (UI change needed; cœur computes via nemeton::indicateur_r5_deperissement()). Plotly time series: health mode shows alert distribution confidence_class. Quick-mode time series (NDVI/NBR per plot) ships E6.b phase 3. Persistence: FORDEAD launch writes monitoring_mode, monitoring_threshold_anomaly, monitoring_vegetation_index, monitoring_dates_training, plus validity intersection percentages, metadata.json. module restores inputs whenever project reopened. i18n: ~30 new keys (monitoring_mode_*, monitoring_warning_*, monitoring_class_*, monitoring_qfield_*, health_validation_*, r5_*). tab renamed Suivi sanitaire / Forest health monitoring. Dependencies: plotly promoted Imports; nemeton (>= 0.20.1.9004) (FORDEAD pipeline + helpers).

title: nemetonshiny 0.20.0 (2026-04-24)
text: LiDAR HD MNH preferred CHM source. download path now tries download_ign_lidar_hd(product = "mnh") via happign first — direct airborne measurement (~0.5 m vertical accuracy, NDP 2 precision). Open-Canopy ML remains fallback LiDAR HD tiles missing AOI. LiDAR HD MNT promoted dem slot (1 m vs 25 m BD ALTI) W3 (TWI), R1 (feu), R2 (tempête), R3 (sécheresse) erosion risk run LiDAR HD resolution. NDP 1 “Observation” auto-lifts whenever LiDAR HD product (MNH MNT) cached AOI, via attr(compute_unit, "has_lidar_hd") consumed nemeton::detect_ndp(). Stratified GRTS kicks sampling plan. Two new reactives (chm_raster, mnt_raster) load cached CHM / MNT LiDAR-first / fallback order pass nemeton::create_sampling_plan(). core upgrades LPM2 stratified GRTS whenever CHM + MNT + BD Forêt available. draw method surfaced generation toast. New “Hauteur LiDAR HD” badge Synthesis tab (augmented_height_lidar_* i18n keys) — green, distinct cyan “Hauteur ML” used Open-Canopy. chm_phase:lidar_hd_download progress key translated compute status line reads “Téléchargement CHM LiDAR HD (IGN)…” instead raw key.

title: nemetonshiny 0.20.0 (2026-04-24)
text: forest_mask passed sampling plan: reuse project’s cached BD Forêt v2 polygons (filtered true forest) points falling water, fields roads filtered min_forest_cover = 0.7 constraint. Fixes Couchey lake scenario. Map zoom fixed UGF extent, BD Forêt’s (fetched buffer dominating auto-fit). Immediate toast Générer les placettes spinning gear, matching Projet chargé / Retry pattern. Dispatched root session. Tooltip Source du CV radio explicitly states choice controls CV value (Cochran), draw method (GRTS / LPM2 / random). Sampling method note rewritten describe full pipeline: candidates regular 50 m grid, filtered forest mask, GRTS → LPM2 → random depending provided.

title: nemetonshiny 0.20.0 (2026-04-24)
text: Duplicate PostGIS-sync toast compute completion — removed second occurrence mod_progress; mod_home one fires now. Immediate toast clicking Réessayer compute-error card, dispatched root session.

title: nemetonshiny 0.20.0 (2026-04-24)
text: Bumped nemeton minimum >= 0.19.5 (height_lidar augmented flag TSP tour integration).

title: nemetonshiny 0.19.0 (2026-04-24)
text: Tooltips six sidebar inputs Export terrain sub-tab (target error, alpha risk, -sample ratio, CV position, seed, region). tooltip explains statistical biological meaning parameter. TSP legend map: sampling plan ≥ 2 Base plots drawn, legend panel appears bottom-left three inline-SVG glyphs — dashed magenta line (Ordre de visite), open triangle (Départ), double concentric circle (Arrivée) — matching markers route map. Retry toast: clicking Réessayer now fires immediate notification spinning arrow-clockwise icon (“Projet réinitialisé — prêt à relancer le calcul.”), dispatched root session lands top-level toast stack.

title: nemetonshiny 0.19.0 (2026-04-24)
text: Duplicate PostGIS-sync toast compute completion: notification used fire mod_home mod_progress slightly different wording (“la base PostGIS” vs “la base de données PostGIS”). Kept mod_home one (orchestrator), dropped mod_progress one. Package documentation icon RStudio’s Packages pane: added URL BugReports fields DESCRIPTION icon now rendered alongside globe uninstall icons.

title: nemetonshiny 0.19.0 (2026-04-24)
text: README: synced counters real state (31 indicators, 13 expert profiles, 504 i18n translation keys). Previously 29 / 16 / 293. i18n: sampling_tt_region tooltip says QGIS, QField (species dropdown defined QGIS project descriptor).

what: New feature — Sample size from target error + BD Forêt v2 CV (E5.c)
title: nemetonshiny 0.18.0 (2026-04-24)
text: R/mod_sampling.R — sidebar accordion Export terrain sub-tab gains Mode de dimensionnement radio (Taille fixe / Erreur cible). Erreur cible mode user picks relative error (default 10 %), alpha risk (default 5 %), -sample ratio (default 20 %) either manual CV automatic CV derived BD Forêt v2 via nemeton::cv_from_bdforet(). computed sample size shown live inputs, along diagnostics BD Forêt v2 coverage ambiguous / unmapped TFV codes. BD Forêt v2 read project cache populated first compute run (<project>/cache/layers/bdforet.gpkg). cache absent, UI points user manual mode via explicit warning. TFV column auto-detected (TFV, tfv, code_tfv) cope different WFS layouts. existing Taille fixe path preserved via conditionalPanel; create_sampling_plan() called n_base / n_over computed upstream depending mode. Bumped nemeton dependency >= 0.19.0.9000 (dev version introducing compute_sample_size(), cv_from_bdforet() editable CV typology CSVs). 19 new FR/EN i18n keys (sampling_sizing_mode, sampling_mode_*, sampling_target_error_label, sampling_alpha_label, sampling_over_ratio_label, sampling_cv_source_*, sampling_cv_position*, sampling_cv_compute, sampling_cv_bdforet_hint, sampling_cv_bdforet_missing, sampling_cv_computed, sampling_cv_ambiguous, sampling_cv_unmapped, sampling_n_computed*). Tests: 6 new testServer assertions covering Cochran sizing path (manual CV) bail-CV zero. Full suite 5145 / 0 failure.

what: New feature — Field ingest (E5.b — QField return path)
title: nemetonshiny 0.18.0 (2026-04-24)
text: R/mod_field_ingest.R — new “Ingestion terrain” tab closes terrain → plateforme loop. field agent drops GeoPackage returned QField; module runs nemeton::import_qfield_gpkg() + validate_field_data(), renders validation report (counts, errors, warnings), previews placettes / arbres project map. NDP bump attach: clicking Rattacher au projet calls aggregate_plot_metrics() + attach_field_data_to_units() project’s UGF sf, tags via tag_field_data_sources(), runs detect_ndp() along alternative field path (NDP 2 plots , NDP 3 10 trees/plot average), persists GPKG <project>/data/field_data.gpkg updates project metadata bumped NDP picked every downstream module (synthesis badge, family tabs). /NDP badges make change visible user. MVP scope: iteration persists field data bumps NDP, rerun compute_all_indicators(). indicators consuming field aggregates (P1, P2, B2, C1, R2) picked next compute triggered Home tab. i18n: 22 new FR/EN keys (tab_field_ingest, field_ingest_*, field_ingest_ndp_before / _after, report headers). Tests: tests/testthat/test-mod_field_ingest.R — 24 assertions covering UI controls, reactive NULL state, validate flow real-ish GPKG (placettes + arbres) attach flow mocked persistence (GPKG written project dir + metadata update recorded).

what: Sampling module now uses the library-level GRTS pipeline
title: nemetonshiny 0.18.0 (2026-04-24)
text: R/mod_sampling.R — replace temporary sf::st_sample(..., type = "random") draw nemeton::create_sampling_plan(), delivers GRTS stratification CHM/DEM/BD Forêt layers provided falls back spatially-balanced LPM2 plain random otherwise. notification now appends draw method (GRTS, LPM2, RANDOM) users can see path taken. i18n: sampling_method_note rewritten describe new behaviour.

what: New feature — Field sampling / QField export (E5.a)
title: nemetonshiny 0.18.0 (2026-04-24)
text: R/mod_sampling.R — new “Terrain” tab: given current project’s study area (union indicators_sf polygons), user sets n_base / n_over / seed / biogeographic region, clicks Générer, previews sample plots leaflet map. Télécharger le projet QField (.qgz) button produces QField-ready project via nemeton::create_qfield_project() (placettes + empty arbres layer + pre-configured forms). First iteration uses spatial random draw (sf::st_sample). full stratified GRTS + TSP pipeline 09-sampling tutorial lifted nemeton::create_sampling_plan() follow-. DESCRIPTION now requires nemeton (>= 0.18.0.9000) create_qfield_project(). i18n: 14 new FR/EN keys (tab_sampling, sampling_*, qfield_*). Tests: tests/testthat/test-mod_sampling.R — 23 assertions covering UI controls, reactive draw, empty-state handling round-trip .qgz built module’s generated plots.

title: nemetonshiny 0.18.0 (2026-04-24)
text: F1 now uses absolute SoilGrids CEC scoring path core package. compute_single_indicator() passes source = "soilgrids" indicateur_f1_fertilite(), streams 250 m CEC topsoil raster demand via nemeton::load_raster_source() applies nemeton::cec_to_fertility_score() (absolute 0-100). Scores now comparable across projects instead min-maxed per AOI. Removed duplicated download_soilgrids_cec() entry DATA_SOURCES$rasters$soil. core package owns download path (ADR-009), app longer stages SoilGrids layer layers$rasters$soil. One less pre-compute step surfaces progress UI. Bumped nemeton dependency >= 0.17.0.9000 (dev version introducing load_raster_source(), source = "soilgrids", UTS → fertility crosswalk).

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: First release targeting v0.17.0 nemeton core. End--end integration Open-Canopy CHM pipeline, live per-step progress feedback, consolidated i18n layer.

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: ⚡ Hauteur ML — CHM consumed height-aware indicators (C1, B2, R2, P2). 📋 Inventaire estimé ML — P1 / P3 / E1 ran, meaning dbh / density synthesised CHM via nemeton::ensure_inventory_fields() (Charru 2012 self-thinning). BD Forêt enrichment P2 — UGFs enriched species / age BD Forêt V2 -front via nemeton::enrich_parcels_bdforet() indicateur_p2_station scheduled, CHM mode can run instead falling back legacy fertility / climate path never inputs.

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: “Étape 1/5 : chargement de l’AOI…” “Étape 2/5 : téléchargement ortho IGN…” + “Téléchargement ortho IGN RVB : tuile 5/28…” per WMS tile “Étape 3/5 : configuration Python + téléchargement modèle…” “Étape 4/5 : inférence du modèle pvtv2…” + “Inférence CHM : tuile 2/3…” per inference tile “Étape 5/5 : export des résultats…” Initialisation spinner — toast paints ⚙ + “Initialisation des calculs…” moment user clicks “Lancer les calculs” “Réessayer”, 1-3 s gap async worker writes first progress event longer silent. Task translator unified — mod_progress.R longer ships partial translate_task(); delegates canonical translate_task_message() utils_i18n.R, every new task prefix routed label one place.

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: Single source truth — TRANSLATIONS list R/utils_i18n.R now runtime dictionary. stale inst/app/i18n/{fr,en}.json files (339 keys, 19 behind R list) removed unused shiny.i18n suggested dependency dropped. export_translations_json() remains available one-way R → JSON exports external translators.

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: download_chm_opencanopy() — unwraps bare SpatRaster / sf returned download_{raster,vector}_source() instead chasing $object attribute didn’t exist. previous code called [[ SpatRaster looking layer named “object” triggered terra [subset] invalid name(s) error aborted whole CHM pipeline forced P2 back legacy mode. Open-Canopy pipeline resume — retry recompute paths now reset project “draft” wait user re- launch run, instead silently firing new compute_task invocation. One entry point confirmation modal. Resume legacy progress file — translate_task_message() now maps pre-e74bdcc literal "download:source_chm_opencanopy" new "chm_inference_opencanopy" label re-opening older project longer spams “Translation key found: source_chm_opencanopy”. Tests — NEMETONSHINY_DISABLE_CHM=1 now scoped test run via withr::local_envvar(.local_envir = testthat::teardown_env()) dedicated setup-chm.R, devtools::test() interactive session longer leaves CHM pipeline silently disabled.

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: None. CHM toggle previously visible compute button disappeared, underlying metadata still written (now reflecting outcome auto-detected run, user’s priori choice), synthesis badge keeps working old projects.

title: nemetonshiny 0.15.1
text: See git history.
